---
title: "Model Summary"
author: "Anthony Sung"
date: today
format: pdf
---

{{< include sections/08_connection.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/01_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/02_benchmarks.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/03_lm_equilibrium.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/04_timing_incentives.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/05_endogenous_timing.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/06_welfare.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/07_summary_table.qmd >}}
